pred_sql:
WITH closed_schools AS (
  SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
  FROM schools
  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
),
county_counts AS (
  SELECT County, COUNT(*) as school_count
  FROM closed_schools
  GROUP BY County
),
top_county AS (
  SELECT County
  FROM county_counts
  ORDER BY school_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT cs.County, cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN top_county tc ON cs.County = tc.County
ORDER BY cs.School;
question: Which different county has the most number of closed schools? Please provide the name of each school as well as the closure date.
